title: Define Window Properties
text: Define Window Properties Define the window properties for the current form. Fields Window Type (WindowType) Caption System Menu (SysMenu) Iconize (CanIconize) Maximize Close (CanClose) [FRM] Resizable (CanResize) No Form Scrollbars (NOFORMSCROLL) Auto Close (AutoClose) Modality & Attachment Direction Keep Layout State (KeepLayout) Layout State Storage (LAYOUTSTORAGE) Image Type Background Image (BackImage) Horizontal Alignment (Halign) Vertical Alignment ( Valign) Horizontal Scaling ( Hscale) Vertical Scaling ( Vscale) Preserve Aspect Ratio ( PreserveAspect) Background Color (BackColor) Parent Form (TABPAGE) Is Independent Form Hide Previous Related Links Defining Single Document Interface (SDI) Behavior By default, Uniface forms use a Multiple Document Interface (MDI), but it is possible to set window properties to force Single Document Interface (SDI) behavior. Defining Popup Forms Use the Window Type and other component instance properties to define a popup form. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
